name: get_satellite_tile
behavior: [READ] Resolves a latitude/longitude pair into the corresponding current satellite tile path stored in the local benchmark dataset.

name: classify_land_use
behavior: [READ] Uses the vision backend to identify which OpenStreetMap land-use categories are present at the site. Returns a list of matching tags from: 'landuse' (built-up/managed land), 'natural' (vegetation/water/bare ground), 'leisure' (parks/sports/recreation). A site may have multiple categories.

name: analyze_urban_density
behavior: [READ] Uses the vision backend to estimate population density and returns a score from 0.0 (uninhabited) to 9.9 (extremely dense), calibrated against cities worldwide.

name: detect_infrastructure
behavior: [READ] Uses the vision backend to determine whether a specific infrastructure element is present (True) or absent (False) in the satellite image. Supported types: Bridge, Stadium, Train Station, Golf Field, Soccer Ball Field, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Roundabout, Basketball Court, Ground Track Field, Baseball Field, Overpass, Storage Tank, Windmill.

name: submit_site_assessment
behavior: [WRITE] Persists the agent's final site assessment and justification into the benchmark state as the completed decision record. Requires explicit user confirmation before calling.

name: transfer_to_human_agents
behavior: [WRITE] Transfer the user to a human agent, with a summary of the user's issue.
